overall.description: A smooth forward movement along a sandy beach in GTA V (evidenced by Snapmatic UI), featuring clear blue skies, calm coastal waters, and a distant cityscape across the bay. The camera moves steadily past dunes and scattered trees on the left, maintaining a tranquil, exploratory atmosphere typical of open-world game environments.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily along a wide, open beach in a game engine environment. Sandy terrain stretches ahead with calm waters to the right and scattered trees on sandy dunes to the left. In the distance, a coastal city sits at the base of mountain ranges under a clear blue sky. The scene is devoid of people or vehicles, creating a serene, exploratory atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a serene coastline that maintains a steady, exploratory pace toward a distant urban horizon. It begins by gliding across a wide, open beach where sandy terrain stretches forward beneath a clear blue sky. As the camera advances, the view unfolds to reveal calm waters shimmering to the right and scattered trees clinging to sandy dunes on the left. The scene then expands to bring a coastal city into clearer focus, nestled at the base of towering mountain ranges in the far distance. This steady progression continues through the empty landscape, emphasizing the tranquil and isolated atmosphere of the environment.
